description: CompositionPink bateau neck kurta made of 100% cotton, with half sleeves, buttoned  chest placket with printed bib, pintucked shoulders, has a split side hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this pink kurta from w! Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
